title: 美国防部超三分之二工作流弃用Anthropic
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
AI Notkilleveryoneism Memes ⏸️
@AISafetyMemes
"Mythos is too dangerous to let non-Americans use it, and also we are proud of not using it"
Department of War CTO
@DoWCTO
8h
Over two-thirds of the @ DeptofWar has officially transitioned off Anthropic models in daily workflows in favor of alternative AI vendors.
The Department will no longer be single-threaded to one AI provider. Our warfighters will have access to a diverse suite of AI capabilities Show more
12:23 AM · Jun 16, 2026 2.4K Views

discovery_record.discovery_summary: 超过三分之二的美国国防部已正式将日常工作流程从Anthropic模型迁移至其他AI供应商。 该部门将不再单一依赖某一家AI提供商。我们的作战人员将能够使用多样化的AI能力，确保实现真正的决策优势。🇺🇸
